project.name: Alganon Single-Player Recreation
project.description: Standalone Java 8 Swing single-player reimagining of the MMORPG Alganon (2009): guided race/family/class character creation, six classes with stances/schools/resources, top-down zone exploration, real-time-with-cooldowns combat, quests, an offline "Study" progression system, crafting/tradeskills with an auction-house vendor, and a simulated background faction war. Zero external dependencies, procedural Graphics2D.
